subcodes.title: Words to Shaykh Salman, spoken on 1915-01-10
subcodes.first_line: It is universally recognized that evil is stronger than good. Evil has a rapid effect, whereas good is slow in its impact.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مسئله مسلم عموم است که شر قویتر از خیر است شر شر سریع التاثیر است
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil, @education of children; moral education
